name: Audit project issues
description: what can you find as issues in this project?

goal.answer: Conduct a comprehensive audit of the World Cup Live project across code quality, security, performance, and architecture, and produce a detailed issues report with severity ratings, file references, and actionable recommendations.

criteria.answer:
ESLint errors and warnings are catalogued with file paths, line numbers, and severity
Security issues (exposed .env secrets, client-side API keys) are documented with immediate remediation steps
Performance concerns (bundle size >500KB, unoptimized images) are quantified with evidence
Architecture issues (oversized files, prop drilling, memoization gaps) are identified
A synthesized master report exists at .kimchi/docs/project-audit-report.md with prioritized recommendations
Reports are read-only — no source files were modified during the audit

constraints.answer: Do not modify source files during the audit phase., Do not commit changes to git., Do not push or expose findings publicly.

assumptions.answer: User wants a comprehensive audit covering all categories, not a targeted fix.; Deliverable is a report document, not code changes.; The project is a React + Vite + TypeScript + Supabase web app.; No additional user input needed — scope confirmed.

phases.name: Comprehensive Audit & Report
phases.goal: Audit and report all issues found in the project
phases.description: Run static analysis (ESLint, TypeScript, build output, manual source review) across all four categories. Produce individual category reports and a synthesized master report.
constraints: Security findings must note severity and remediation steps

steps.description: Run ESLint, TypeScript build, and bundle analysis to quantify issues

verification.command: cd /home/blueclouds/workspace/github/7wing/world-cup-live && npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build

steps.description: Write code quality audit report (ESLint errors, console logs, TS issues, dead code, large files)
Write security audit report (exposed secrets, client-side keys, auth patterns)
Write performance and architecture audit report (bundle size, images, lazy loading, duplicates, prop drilling)
Synthesize all findings into master report with prioritized recommendations

phases.summary: Phase 1 complete. Produced 4 audit reports covering code quality (31 issues), security (3 issues including exposed API keys), performance/architecture (bundle size, images, memoization), and a synthesized master report with 50 prioritized issues and actionable recommendations. All reports verified against real project state.
